docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance evaluated_entity * recommended AnalysisSourceData A slot to provide the data that was analysed by the DataAnalysis. DataGeneratingActivity evaluated_activity * recommended EvaluatedActivity The slot to specify the Activity about which the DataGeneratingActivity produced information. DataGeneratingActivity realized_plan 0..1  Plan The slot to specify the Plan (i.e. directive information or procedure) that was realized by an Activity. DataGeneratingActivity occurred_in 0..1  Surrounding The slot to specify the Surrounding in which an Activity took place. DataGeneratingActivity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Activity title *  String The slot to provide a title for the Activity. Activity description *  String The slot to provide a description for the Activity. Activity other_identifier *  Identifier The slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Activity. Activity has_part *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity that is part of the Activity. Activity had_input_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was used as an input of an Activity that is to be changed, consumed or transformed. Activity had_output_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was generated as an output of an Activity. Activity had_input_activity * recommended Activity The slot to provide a previous Activity that informed the Activity by being causally via a shared participant. Activity carried_out_by * recommended AgenticEntity The slot to specify the AgenticEntity that played a certain part in carrying out the Activity, either via having a specific role, function or disposition that was realized in the Activity. Activity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity part_of *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity of which the Activity is a part. Activity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Class: DataGeneratingActivity
docs.text:
An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity.

URI: prov:Activity

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance evaluated_entity * recommended EvaluatedEntity The slot to specify the Entity about which the DataGeneratingActivity produced information. direct evaluated_activity * recommended EvaluatedActivity The slot to specify the Activity about which the DataGeneratingActivity produced information. direct realized_plan 0..1  Plan The slot to specify the Plan (i.e. directive information or procedure) that was realized by an Activity. direct occurred_in 0..1  Surrounding The slot to specify the Surrounding in which an Activity took place. direct id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Activity title *  String The slot to provide a title for the Activity. Activity description *  String The slot to provide a description for the Activity. Activity other_identifier *  Identifier The slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Activity. Activity has_part *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity that is part of the Activity. Activity had_input_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was used as an input of an Activity that is to be changed, consumed or transformed. Activity had_output_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was generated as an output of an Activity. Activity had_input_activity * recommended Activity The slot to provide a previous Activity that informed the Activity by being causally via a shared participant. Activity carried_out_by * recommended AgenticEntity The slot to specify the AgenticEntity that played a certain part in carrying out the Activity, either via having a specific role, function or disposition that was realized in the Activity. Activity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity part_of *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity of which the Activity is a part. Activity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.text:

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance has_percentage_of_total * recommended PercentageOfTotal A slot to specify the percentage of a specific ChemicalSubstance in relation to the total amount of that same substance used across a multi-step reaction. direct has_concentration * recommended Concentration The slot to provide the Concentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of * recommended ChemicalEntity The slot to provide the chemical entities of which a ChemicalSubstance is composed of. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. AgenticEntity title 0..1  String This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. AgenticEntity description 0..1  String This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. AgenticEntity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier for an Instrument. AgenticEntity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity AgenticEntity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity AgenticEntity has_part *  AgenticEntity The slot to specify parts of an AgenticEntity that are themselves AgenticEntities. AgenticEntity part_of *  AgenticEntity The slot to provide the AgenticEntity of which theAgenticEntity is a part. AgenticEntity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin

docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance access_URL 1..*  Resource A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. direct access_service *  DataService A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset. direct applicable_legislation *  LegalResource The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Distribution. direct availability 0..1 recommended Concept An indication how long it is planned to keep the Distribution of the Dataset available. direct byte_size 0..1  NonNegativeInteger The size of a Distribution in bytes. direct checksum 0..1  Checksum A mechanism that can be used to verify that the contents of a distribution have not changed. direct compression_format 0..1  MediaType The format of the file in which the data is contained in a compressed form, e.g. to reduce the size of the downloadable file. direct description * recommended String A free-text account of the Distribution. direct documentation *  Document A page or document about this Distribution. direct download_URL *  Resource A URL that is a direct link to a downloadable file in a given format. direct format 0..1 recommended MediaTypeOrExtent The file format of the Distribution. direct has_policy 0..1  Policy The policy expressing the rights associated with the distribution if using the [[ODRL]] vocabulary. direct language *  LinguisticSystem A language used in the Distribution. direct licence 0..1  LicenseDocument A licence under which the Distribution is made available. direct linked_schemas *  Standard An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms. direct media_type 0..1  MediaType The media type of the Distribution as defined in the official register of media types managed by IANA. direct modification_date 0..1  Date The most recent date on which the Distribution was changed or modified. direct packaging_format 0..1  MediaType The format of the file in which one or more data files are grouped together, e.g. to enable a set of related files to be downloaded together. direct release_date 0..1  Date The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Distribution. direct rights 0..1  RightsStatement A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. direct spatial_resolution 0..1  Decimal The minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset distribution, measured in meters. direct status 0..1  Concept The status of the distribution in the context of maturity lifecycle. direct temporal_resolution 0..1  Duration The minimum time period resolvable in the dataset distribution. direct title *  String A name given to the Distribution. direct

docs.title: Class: Entity
docs.text:
A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary.

    inlined_as_list: true

docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Activity had_output_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was generated as an output of an Activity. Activity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• Entity [ ClassifierMixin]
    • MaterialEntity [ MaterialisticMixin]
      • StartingMaterial [ ChemicalSubstanceMixin]
      • Reagent [ ChemicalSubstanceMixin]
      • ChemicalProduct [ ChemicalSubstanceMixin]

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin title 0..1  String The slot to provide a title for the Entity. Entity description 0..1  String The slot to provide a description for the Entity. Entity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Entity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Entity. Entity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_part * recommended MaterialEntity The slot to provide the parts of a MaterialEntity. Entity part_of *  Entity The slot to specify an Entity of which the Entity is a part. Entity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Class: MaterialisticMixin
docs.text:
A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all material entities. It is needed for example to have MaterialSample have the same properties as MaterialEntity, although it is defined as a subclass of EvaluatedEntity.

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

URI: chemdcatap:class/MaterialisticMixin

 classDiagram
    class MaterialisticMixin
    click MaterialisticMixin href "../../classes/MaterialisticMixin/"
      MaterialisticMixin <|-- ChemicalSubstanceMixin
        click ChemicalSubstanceMixin href "../../classes/ChemicalSubstanceMixin/"
      MaterialisticMixin <|-- MaterialEntity
        click MaterialEntity href "../../classes/MaterialEntity/"
      MaterialisticMixin <|-- MaterialSample
        click MaterialSample href "../../classes/MaterialSample/"
      MaterialisticMixin <|-- Reactor
        click Reactor href "../../classes/Reactor/"

      MaterialisticMixin : alternative_label

      MaterialisticMixin : has_density





        MaterialisticMixin --> "* _recommended_" Density : has_density
        click Density href "../../classes/Density/"



      MaterialisticMixin : has_mass





        MaterialisticMixin --> "* _recommended_" Mass : has_mass
        click Mass href "../../classes/Mass/"



      MaterialisticMixin : has_physical_state





        MaterialisticMixin --> "0..1" PhysicalStateEnum : has_physical_state
        click PhysicalStateEnum href "../../enums/PhysicalStateEnum/"



      MaterialisticMixin : has_pressure





        MaterialisticMixin --> "* _recommended_" Pressure : has_pressure
        click Pressure href "../../classes/Pressure/"



      MaterialisticMixin : has_temperature





        MaterialisticMixin --> "* _recommended_" Temperature : has_temperature
        click Temperature href "../../classes/Temperature/"



      MaterialisticMixin : has_volume





        MaterialisticMixin --> "* _recommended_" Volume : has_volume
        click Volume href "../../classes/Volume/"

docs.title: Mixin Usage
docs.text: mixed into description MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process.

  chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each
  discrete molecule of that compound.

is_a: QualitativeAttribute

docs.title: Class: PercentageOfTotal
docs.text:
A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction.

URI: qudt:Quantity

docs.title: Class: Plan

docs.title: Class: PolymerMixin
docs.text:
A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all chemical substances that are composed of macromolecules of different kinds and which may be differentiated by composition, length, degree of branching etc..

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

URI: chemdcatap:class/PolymerMixin

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance has_concentration * recommended Concentration The slot to provide the Concentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of * recommended ChemicalEntity The slot to provide the chemical entities of which a ChemicalSubstance is composed of. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin

ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of * recommended ChemicalEntity The slot to provide the chemical entities of which a ChemicalSubstance is composed of. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin derived_from 0..1  Entity The slot to specify the MaterialEntity or MaterialSample from which the MaterialSample was created. MaterialSample alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin was_generated_by *  Activity A slot to provide the Activity which created the EvaluatedEntity. EvaluatedEntity title 0..1  String The slot to provide a title for the EvaluatedEntity. Entity description 0..1  String The slot to provide a description for the EvaluatedEntity. Entity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Entity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier of the EvaluatedEntity. Entity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_part *  Entity A slot to provide a part of the Entity. Entity part_of *  Entity The slot to specify an Entity of which the Entity is a part. Entity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

name: QuantitativeAttribute
description: A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity,
  Activity or AgenticEntity.

- domain_agnostic_core

- description
- value

  value:
    name: value
    description: The slot to provide the literal value of the QuantitativeAttribute.
    range: float
    required: true
attributes:
  has_quantity_type:
    name: has_quantity_type
    description: The type of quality that is quantifiable according to the QUDT ontology.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: qudt:hasQuantityKind
    domain_of:
    - QuantitativeAttribute
    range: DefinedTerm
    bindings:
    - range: QUDTQuantityKindEnum
      obligation_level: RECOMMENDED
      binds_value_of: id
      description: Binds the type of a quantifiable attribute to a QUDT Quantity Kind
        instance from the QUDT Quantity Kind vocabulary.
    required: true
  unit:
    name: unit
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: qudt:unit
    domain_of:
    - QuantitativeAttribute
    range: DefinedTerm
    bindings:
    - range: QUDTUnitEnum
      obligation_level: RECOMMENDED
      binds_value_of: id
      description: Restricts the allowable defined terms to the QUDT Unit vocabulary.
    recommended: true
class_uri: qudt:Quantity

docs.title: Class: ReactionMonitoring
docs.text:
A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results.

URI: prov:Activity

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• Activity [ ClassifierMixin]
    • DataGeneratingActivity
      • ReactionMonitoring

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance evaluated_entity * recommended EvaluatedEntity The slot to specify the Entity about which the DataGeneratingActivity produced information. DataGeneratingActivity evaluated_activity * recommended ChemicalReaction The slot to specify the ChemicalReaction being recorded. DataGeneratingActivity realized_plan 0..1  Plan The slot to specify the Plan (i.e. directive information or procedure) that was realized by an Activity. DataGeneratingActivity occurred_in 0..1  Surrounding The slot to specify the Surrounding in which an Activity took place. DataGeneratingActivity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Activity title *  String The slot to provide a title for the Activity. Activity description *  String The slot to provide a description for the Activity. Activity other_identifier *  Identifier The slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Activity. Activity has_part *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity that is part of the Activity. Activity had_input_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was used as an input of an Activity that is to be changed, consumed or transformed. Activity had_output_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was generated as an output of an Activity. Activity had_input_activity * recommended Activity The slot to provide a previous Activity that informed the Activity by being causally via a shared participant. Activity carried_out_by * recommended AgenticEntity The slot to specify the AgenticEntity that played a certain part in carrying out the Activity, either via having a specific role, function or disposition that was realized in the Activity. Activity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity part_of *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity of which the Activity is a part. Activity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.text:
name: ReactionMonitoring
description: A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction,
  such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation
  workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between
  raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles
  that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses
  and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/
is_a: DataGeneratingActivity
slot_usage:
  evaluated_activity:
    name: evaluated_activity
    description: The slot to specify the ChemicalReaction being recorded.
    range: ChemicalReaction
    multivalued: true
    inlined_as_list: true
class_uri: prov:Activity

docs.title: Class: ReactionMonitoringDataset
docs.text:
A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class.

URI: dcat:Dataset

docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance access_rights 0..1  RightsStatement Information that indicates whether the Dataset is publicly accessible, has access restrictions or is not public. Dataset applicable_legislation *  LegalResource The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. Dataset conforms_to *  Standard An implementing rule or other specification. Dataset contact_point * recommended Kind Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. Dataset creator *  Agent An entity responsible for producing the dataset. Dataset dataset_distribution *  Distribution An available Distribution for the Dataset. Dataset description 1..*  String A free-text account of the Dataset. Dataset documentation *  Document A page or document about this Dataset. Dataset frequency 0..1  Frequency The frequency at which the Dataset is updated. Dataset geographical_coverage *  Location A geographic region that is covered by the Dataset. Dataset has_version *  Dataset A related Dataset that is a version, edition, or adaptation of the described Dataset. Dataset identifier *  String The main identifier for the Dataset, e.g. the URI or other unique identifier in the context of the Catalogue. Dataset in_series *  DatasetSeries A dataset series of which the dataset is part. Dataset is_referenced_by *  Resource A related resource, such as a publication, that references, cites, or otherwise points to the dataset. Dataset keyword * recommended String A keyword or tag describing the Dataset. Dataset landing_page *  Document A web page that provides access to the Dataset, its Distributions and/or additional information. Dataset language *  LinguisticSystem A language of the Dataset. Dataset modification_date 0..1  Date The most recent date on which the Dataset was changed or modified. Dataset other_identifier *  Identifier A secondary identifier of the Dataset Dataset provenance *  ProvenanceStatement A statement about the lineage of a Dataset. Dataset publisher 0..1  Agent An entity (organisation) responsible for making the Dataset available. Dataset qualified_attribution *  Attribution An Agent having some form of responsibility for the resource. Dataset qualified_relation *  Relationship A description of a relationship with another resource. Dataset related_resource *  Resource A related resource. Dataset release_date 0..1  Date The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Dataset. Dataset sample *  Distribution A sample distribution of the dataset. Dataset source *  Dataset A related Dataset from which the described Dataset is derived. Dataset spatial_resolution 0..1  Decimal The minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset, measured in meters. Dataset temporal_coverage *  PeriodOfTime A temporal period that the Dataset covers. Dataset temporal_resolution 0..1  Duration The minimum time period resolvable in the dataset. Dataset theme * recommended Concept A category of the Dataset. Dataset title 1..*  String A name given to the Dataset. Dataset type *  Concept A type of the Dataset. Dataset version 0..1  String The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource. Dataset version_notes *  String A description of the differences between this version and a previous version of the Dataset. Dataset was_generated_by 1..*  ReactionMonitoring The slot to specify the ReactionMonitoring activity that produced this dataset. Dataset id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Dataset is_about_entity * recommended EvaluatedEntity A slot to provide the EvaluatedEntity a Dataset is about. Dataset is_about_activity * recommended ChemicalReaction The slot to specify the ChemicalReaction this dataset is about. Dataset

docs.title: Class: Reactor
docs.text:
A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process.

URI: AFE:0000153

 classDiagram
    class Reactor
    click Reactor href "../../classes/Reactor/"
      MaterialisticMixin <|-- Reactor
        click MaterialisticMixin href "../../classes/MaterialisticMixin/"
      Device <|-- Reactor
        click Device href "../../classes/Device/"

      Reactor : alternative_label

      Reactor : description

      Reactor : has_density





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Density : has_density
        click Density href "../../classes/Density/"



      Reactor : has_mass





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Mass : has_mass
        click Mass href "../../classes/Mass/"



      Reactor : has_part





        Reactor --> "*" Device : has_part
        click Device href "../../classes/Device/"



      Reactor : has_physical_state





        Reactor --> "0..1" PhysicalStateEnum : has_physical_state
        click PhysicalStateEnum href "../../enums/PhysicalStateEnum/"



      Reactor : has_pressure





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Pressure : has_pressure
        click Pressure href "../../classes/Pressure/"



      Reactor : has_qualitative_attribute





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" QualitativeAttribute : has_qualitative_attribute
        click QualitativeAttribute href "../../classes/QualitativeAttribute/"



      Reactor : has_quantitative_attribute





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" QuantitativeAttribute : has_quantitative_attribute
        click QuantitativeAttribute href "../../classes/QuantitativeAttribute/"



      Reactor : has_temperature





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Temperature : has_temperature
        click Temperature href "../../classes/Temperature/"



      Reactor : has_volume





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Volume : has_volume
        click Volume href "../../classes/Volume/"



      Reactor : id

      Reactor : other_identifier





        Reactor --> "*" Identifier : other_identifier
        click Identifier href "../../classes/Identifier/"



      Reactor : part_of





        Reactor --> "*" AgenticEntity : part_of
        click AgenticEntity href "../../classes/AgenticEntity/"



      Reactor : rdf_type





        Reactor --> "0..1 _recommended_" DefinedTerm : rdf_type
        click DefinedTerm href "../../classes/DefinedTerm/"



      Reactor : title

      Reactor : type





        Reactor --> "0..1" DefinedTerm : type
        click DefinedTerm href "../../classes/DefinedTerm/"

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• AgenticEntity [ ClassifierMixin]
    • Device
      • Reactor [ MaterialisticMixin]

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. AgenticEntity title 0..1  String This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. AgenticEntity description 0..1  String This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. AgenticEntity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier for a Device. AgenticEntity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity AgenticEntity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity AgenticEntity has_part *  Device The slot to specify parts of a Device that are themselves Devices. AgenticEntity part_of *  AgenticEntity The slot to provide the AgenticEntity of which theAgenticEntity is a part. AgenticEntity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance has_molar_equivalent * recommended MolarEquivalent A slot to provide the MolarEquivalent of a ChemicalSubstance, such as the DissolvingSubstance, Starting Material or Reactant, within the context of a chemical reaction. direct has_concentration * recommended Concentration The slot to provide the Concentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of * recommended ChemicalEntity The slot to provide the chemical entities of which a ChemicalSubstance is composed of. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin title 0..1  String The slot to provide a title for the Entity. Entity description 0..1  String The slot to provide a description for the Entity. Entity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Entity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Entity. Entity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_part * recommended MaterialEntity The slot to provide the parts of a MaterialEntity. Entity part_of *  Entity The slot to specify an Entity of which the Entity is a part. Entity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: Software
description: An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted
  by or directly executed by a computer.
in_subset:
- domain_agnostic_core
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/
exact_mappings:
- schema:SoftwareApplication
is_a: AgenticEntity
slot_usage:
  has_part:
    name: has_part
    description: The slot to specify parts of a Software that are themselves Software.
    range: Software
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  other_identifier:
    name: other_identifier
    description: A slot to provide a secondary identifier for a Software.
    range: Identifier
    required: false
    multivalued: true
    inlined_as_list: true
class_uri: prov:SoftwareAgent

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• Entity [ ClassifierMixin]
    • MaterialEntity [ MaterialisticMixin]
      • StartingMaterial [ ChemicalSubstanceMixin]

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance has_molar_equivalent * recommended MolarEquivalent A slot to provide the MolarEquivalent of a ChemicalSubstance, such as the DissolvingSubstance, Starting Material or Reactant, within the context of a chemical reaction. direct has_concentration * recommended Concentration The slot to provide the Concentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of * recommended ChemicalEntity The slot to provide the chemical entities of which a ChemicalSubstance is composed of. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin title 0..1  String The slot to provide a title for the Entity. Entity description 0..1  String The slot to provide a description for the Entity. Entity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Entity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Entity. Entity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_part * recommended MaterialEntity The slot to provide the parts of a MaterialEntity. Entity part_of *  Entity The slot to specify an Entity of which the Entity is a part. Entity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

      as the DissolvingSubstance, Starting Material or Reactant, within the context
      of a chemical reaction.

    alias: has_molar_equivalent
    owner: StartingMaterial
    domain_of:
    - StartingMaterial
    - Reagent
    - Catalyst
    range: MolarEquivalent
    recommended: true
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  has_concentration:
    name: has_concentration
    description: The slot to provide the Concentration of a ChemicalSubstance.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/
    rank: 1000
    is_a: has_quantitative_attribute

    is_a: has_quantitative_attribute

    - ChemicalSubstanceMixin

    recommended: true
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true

  composed_of:

      is composed of.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/
    close_mappings:
    - AFX:0000940
    rank: 1000
    is_a: has_part
    slot_uri: BFO:0000051
    alias: composed_of
    owner: StartingMaterial
    domain_of:
    - ChemicalSubstanceMixin
    range: ChemicalEntity
    recommended: true
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true

docs.title: Class: SubstanceSample
docs.text:
A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure.

URI: SIO:001378

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• Entity [ ClassifierMixin]
    • EvaluatedEntity
      • MaterialSample [ MaterialisticMixin]
        • SubstanceSample [ ChemicalSubstanceMixin]
          • PolymerSample [ PolymerMixin]

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance has_concentration * recommended Concentration The slot to provide the Concentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of * recommended ChemicalEntity The slot to provide the chemical entities of which a ChemicalSubstance is composed of. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin derived_from 0..1  Entity The slot to specify the MaterialEntity or MaterialSample from which the MaterialSample was created. MaterialSample alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin was_generated_by *  Activity A slot to provide the Activity which created the EvaluatedEntity. EvaluatedEntity title 0..1  String The slot to provide a title for the EvaluatedEntity. Entity description 0..1  String The slot to provide a description for the EvaluatedEntity. Entity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Entity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier of the EvaluatedEntity. Entity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_part *  Entity A slot to provide a part of the Entity. Entity part_of *  Entity The slot to specify an Entity of which the Entity is a part. Entity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Class: SubstanceSampleCharacterization
docs.text:
A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results.

URI: prov:Activity

docs.title: Class: SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset
docs.text:
A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class.

URI: dcat:Dataset

Dataset contact_point * recommended Kind Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. Dataset creator *  Agent An entity responsible for producing the dataset. Dataset dataset_distribution *  Distribution An available Distribution for the Dataset. Dataset description 1..*  String A free-text account of the Dataset. Dataset documentation *  Document A page or document about this Dataset. Dataset frequency 0..1  Frequency The frequency at which the Dataset is updated. Dataset geographical_coverage *  Location A geographic region that is covered by the Dataset. Dataset has_version *  Dataset A related Dataset that is a version, edition, or adaptation of the described Dataset. Dataset identifier *  String The main identifier for the Dataset, e.g. the URI or other unique identifier in the context of the Catalogue. Dataset in_series *  DatasetSeries A dataset series of which the dataset is part. Dataset is_referenced_by *  Resource A related resource, such as a publication, that references, cites, or otherwise points to the dataset. Dataset keyword * recommended String A keyword or tag describing the Dataset. Dataset landing_page *  Document A web page that provides access to the Dataset, its Distributions and/or additional information. Dataset language *  LinguisticSystem A language of the Dataset. Dataset modification_date 0..1  Date The most recent date on which the Dataset was changed or modified. Dataset other_identifier *  Identifier A secondary identifier of the Dataset Dataset provenance *  ProvenanceStatement A statement about the lineage of a Dataset. Dataset publisher 0..1  Agent An entity (organisation) responsible for making the Dataset available. Dataset qualified_attribution *  Attribution An Agent having some form of responsibility for the resource. Dataset qualified_relation *  Relationship A description of a relationship with another resource. Dataset related_resource *  Resource A related resource. Dataset release_date 0..1  Date The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Dataset. Dataset sample *  Distribution A sample distribution of the dataset. Dataset source *  Dataset A related Dataset from which the described Dataset is derived. Dataset spatial_resolution 0..1  Decimal The minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset, measured in meters. Dataset temporal_coverage *  PeriodOfTime A temporal period that the Dataset covers. Dataset temporal_resolution 0..1  Duration The minimum time period resolvable in the dataset. Dataset theme * recommended Concept A category of the Dataset. Dataset title 1..*  String A name given to the Dataset. Dataset type *  Concept A type of the Dataset. Dataset version 0..1  String The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource. Dataset version_notes *  String A description of the differences between this version and a previous version of the Dataset. Dataset was_generated_by 1..*  SubstanceSampleCharacterization The slot to specify the SubstanceCharacterization activity that produced this dataset. Dataset id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Dataset is_about_entity * recommended SubstanceSample The slot to specify the SubstanceSample this dataset is about. Dataset is_about_activity * recommended EvaluatedActivity A slot to provide the EvaluatedActivity a Dataset is about. Dataset

docs.text:
name: SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset
description: A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization
  activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement
  and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles
  that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment
  should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset
  chain instead of reusing this class.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/
is_a: Dataset
slot_usage:
  was_generated_by:
    name: was_generated_by
    description: The slot to specify the SubstanceCharacterization activity that produced
      this dataset.
    range: SubstanceSampleCharacterization
    multivalued: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  is_about_entity:
    name: is_about_entity
    description: The slot to specify the SubstanceSample this dataset is about.
    range: SubstanceSample
    multivalued: true
    inlined_as_list: true
class_uri: dcat:Dataset

docs.title: Class: SupportiveEntity
docs.text:
The supportive entities are supporting the main entities in the Application Profile. They are included in the Application Profile because they form the range of properties.

docs.title: Class: Yield
docs.text:
A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %).

URI: CHMO:0002855

docs.title: Enum: PhysicalStateEnum
docs.text: URI: chemdcatap:enum/PhysicalStateEnum

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description SOLID PATO:0001736 A state of matter in which molecules are closely packed and cannot move past each other. LIQUID PATO:0001735 A state of matter with a definite volume but no fixed shape. Liquids adapt to the shape of their container and are nearly incompressible, maintaining their volume even under pressure. GASEOUS PATO:0001737 A state of matter with neither fixed volume nor fixed shape. PLASMA PATO:0015012 A state of matter in which a gas becomes ionized and conducts electricity, often found in high-energy environments such as stars or lightning.

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description has_physical_state The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity.

    description: A state of matter in which a gas becomes ionized and conducts electricity,
      often found in high-energy environments such as stars or lightning.
    meaning: PATO:0015012

docs.title: chem-dcat-ap
docs.text:
This is an extension of the DCAT Application Profile PLUS LinkML schema. It is intended to be used by NFDI4Chem & NFDI4Cat as a core that can further be extended in profiles/schemas to provide chemistry specific specific metadata for a dataset.

URI: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/

docs.title: Slot: access_rights
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcterms:accessRights Alias: access_rights

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Slot: alternative_label
docs.text:
The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity.

URI: skos:altLabel Alias: alternative_label

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no PolymerMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all chemical substances that are composed of macromolecules of different kinds and which may be differentiated by composition, length, degree of branching etc.. no ChemicalSubstanceMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all material entities that are described in a chemical context via being composed of chemical entities (e.g. atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, complex, conformer etc., ) of the same type or of different types. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no MaterialisticMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all material entities. It is needed for example to have MaterialSample have the same properties as MaterialEntity, although it is defined as a subclass of EvaluatedEntity. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no

For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Slot: carried_out_by
docs.text:
The slot to specify the AgenticEntity that played a certain part in carrying out the Activity, either via having a specific role, function or disposition that was realized in the Activity.

URI: prov:wasAssociatedWith Alias: carried_out_by

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• carried_out_by
    • used_catalyst
    • used_solvent
    • used_reactor

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no

Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Slot: description
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcterms:description Alias: description

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. yes Concept See DCAT-AP specs:Concept no DatasetSeries See DCAT-AP specs:DatasetSeries yes Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no Any This abstract class is needed to create the union of Dataset, DatasetSeries, Catalogue and DataService for the range of the slot primary_topic. no PHValue no ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no ChecksumAlgorithm See DCAT-AP specs:ChecksumAlgorithm no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no Pressure no Identifier See DCAT-AP specs:Identifier no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Frequency See DCAT-AP specs:Frequency no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes Geometry See DCAT-AP specs:Geometry no Resource See DCAT-AP specs:Resource no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no RightsStatement See DCAT-AP specs:RightsStatement no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no Laboratory A facility that provides controlled conditions in which scientific or technological research, experiments, and measurement may be performed. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Plan A piece of information that specifies how an activity has to be carried out by its agents including what kind of steps have to be taken and what kind of parameters have to be met/set. no TimeInstant See DCAT-AP specs:TimeInstant no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no LicenseDocument See DCAT-AP specs:LicenseDocument no CatalogueRecord See DCAT-AP specs:CatalogueRecord yes MolecularFormula A structure descriptor which identifies each constituent element by its chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each discrete molecule of that compound. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no ConceptScheme See DCAT-AP specs:ConceptScheme no LinguisticSystem See DCAT-AP specs:LinguisticSystem no InChi A structure descriptor which conforms to the InChI format specification. no IUPACName A systematic name which is formulated according to the rules and recommendations for chemical nomenclature set out by the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC). no Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no MediaTypeOrExtent See DCAT-AP specs:MediaTypeOrExtent no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no InChIKey no Document See DCAT-AP specs:Document no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no ProvenanceStatement See DCAT-AP specs:ProvenanceStatement no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no LegalResource See DCAT-AP specs:LegalResource no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no SupportiveEntity The supportive entities are supporting the main entities in the Application Profile. They are included in the Application Profile because they form the range of properties. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no Role See DCAT-AP specs:Role no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no Attribution See DCAT-AP specs:Attribution no PeriodOfTime See DCAT-AP specs:PeriodOfTime no Policy See DCAT-AP specs:Policy no Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Distribution See DCAT-AP specs:Distribution yes Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no Standard See DCAT-AP specs:Standard no Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab). no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no MediaType See DCAT-AP specs:MediaType no

Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Slot: has_qualitative_attribute
docs.text:
The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity

URI: dcterms:relation Alias: has_qualitative_attribute

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• has_qualitative_attribute
    • inchi
    • inchikey
    • smiles
    • molecular_formula
    • iupac_name

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no

docs.title: Slot: has_quantity_type
docs.text:
The type of quality that is quantifiable according to the QUDT ontology.

URI: qudt:hasQuantityKind Alias: has_quantity_type

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no Pressure no Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no PHValue no Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no

docs.title: Slot: has_version
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcat:hasVersion Alias: has_version

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no
