It is needed for example to have MaterialSample have the same properties as MaterialEntity, although it is defined as a subclass of EvaluatedEntity. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no

docs.title: Slot: id
docs.text:
A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema.

URI: chemdcatap:slot/id Alias: id

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Document See DCAT-AP specs:Document no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no DefinedTerm A word, name, acronym or phrase that is defined in a controlled vocabulary (CV) and that is used to provide an additional rdf:type or dcterms:type of a class within this schema. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no LicenseDocument See DCAT-AP specs:LicenseDocument no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no LegalResource See DCAT-AP specs:LegalResource no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no Resource See DCAT-AP specs:Resource no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no

This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcterms:language Alias: language

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot CatalogueRecord See DCAT-AP specs:CatalogueRecord yes Distribution See DCAT-AP specs:Distribution yes Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Slot: occurred_in
docs.text:
The slot to specify the Surrounding in which an Activity took place.

URI: prov:atLocation Alias: occurred_in

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no

docs.title: Properties
docs.text: • Range: Surrounding

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/

- DataGeneratingActivity
range: Surrounding

docs.title: Slot: other_identifier
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: adms:identifier Alias: other_identifier

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. yes Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. yes Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. yes ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. yes

docs.title: Slot: qualified_attribution
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: prov:qualifiedAttribution Alias: qualified_attribution

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Slot: rdf_type
docs.text:
The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity.

URI: rdf:type Alias: rdf_type

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. no Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no Laboratory A facility that provides controlled conditions in which scientific or technological research, experiments, and measurement may be performed. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no PHValue no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no InChIKey no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no Plan A piece of information that specifies how an activity has to be carried out by its agents including what kind of steps have to be taken and what kind of parameters have to be met/set. no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. yes MolecularFormula A structure descriptor which identifies each constituent element by its chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each discrete molecule of that compound. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no ClassifierMixin A mixin with which an entity of this schema can be classified via an additional rdf:type or dcterms:type assertion. no Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab). no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no Pressure no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no InChi A structure descriptor which conforms to the InChI format specification. no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no IUPACName A systematic name which is formulated according to the rules and recommendations for chemical nomenclature set out by the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC). no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no

This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. yes Concept See DCAT-AP specs:Concept no DatasetSeries See DCAT-AP specs:DatasetSeries yes Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no Any This abstract class is needed to create the union of Dataset, DatasetSeries, Catalogue and DataService for the range of the slot primary_topic. no PHValue no ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no ChecksumAlgorithm See DCAT-AP specs:ChecksumAlgorithm no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no Pressure no Identifier See DCAT-AP specs:Identifier no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Frequency See DCAT-AP specs:Frequency no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes Geometry See DCAT-AP specs:Geometry no Resource See DCAT-AP specs:Resource no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no RightsStatement See DCAT-AP specs:RightsStatement no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no Laboratory A facility that provides controlled conditions in which scientific or technological research, experiments, and measurement may be performed. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Plan A piece of information that specifies how an activity has to be carried out by its agents including what kind of steps have to be taken and what kind of parameters have to be met/set. no TimeInstant See DCAT-AP specs:TimeInstant no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no DefinedTerm A word, name, acronym or phrase that is defined in a controlled vocabulary (CV) and that is used to provide an additional rdf:type or dcterms:type of a class within this schema. yes ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no LicenseDocument See DCAT-AP specs:LicenseDocument no CatalogueRecord See DCAT-AP specs:CatalogueRecord yes MolecularFormula A structure descriptor which identifies each constituent element by its chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each discrete molecule of that compound. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no ConceptScheme See DCAT-AP specs:ConceptScheme yes LinguisticSystem See DCAT-AP specs:LinguisticSystem no InChi A structure descriptor which conforms to the InChI format specification. no IUPACName A systematic name which is formulated according to the rules and recommendations for chemical nomenclature set out by the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC). no Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no MediaTypeOrExtent See DCAT-AP specs:MediaTypeOrExtent no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no InChIKey no Document See DCAT-AP specs:Document no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no ProvenanceStatement See DCAT-AP specs:ProvenanceStatement no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no LegalResource See DCAT-AP specs:LegalResource no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no SupportiveEntity The supportive entities are supporting the main entities in the Application Profile. They are included in the Application Profile because they form the range of properties. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no Role See DCAT-AP specs:Role no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no Attribution See DCAT-AP specs:Attribution no PeriodOfTime See DCAT-AP specs:PeriodOfTime no Policy See DCAT-AP specs:Policy no Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Distribution See DCAT-AP specs:Distribution yes Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no Standard See DCAT-AP specs:Standard no Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab). no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no MediaType See DCAT-AP specs:MediaType no

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. yes PHValue no InChIKey no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. yes Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no MolecularFormula A structure descriptor which identifies each constituent element by its chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each discrete molecule of that compound. no Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no Pressure no InChi A structure descriptor which conforms to the InChI format specification. no IUPACName A systematic name which is formulated according to the rules and recommendations for chemical nomenclature set out by the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC). no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no

docs.title: Slot: version
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcat:version Alias: version

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Subset: DomainAgnosticCore
docs.text:
The elements of this subset are considered the core layer of our DCAT-AP extension.

URI: DomainAgnosticCore

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/nfdi-de/dcat-ap-plus/chemistry/

docs.title: Classes in subset
docs.text: Class Description Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. ClassifierMixin A mixin with which an entity of this schema can be classified via an additional rdf:type or dcterms:type assertion. DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. DefinedTerm A word, name, acronym or phrase that is defined in a controlled vocabulary (CV) and that is used to provide an additional rdf:type or dcterms:type of a class within this schema. Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. Plan A piece of information that specifies how an activity has to be carried out by its agents including what kind of steps have to be taken and what kind of parameters have to be met/set. QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab).

docs.title: Merged model
docs.text:
This folder contains the fully resolved pid4cat model, including all imported models. The files are auto-generated from the schema in the src/chem_dcat_ap/schema folder and version-stamped by uv-dynamic-versioning. For releases, these files are copied to gh-pages along with the rest of the documentation, making schema files with version information available on gh-pages. The w3id.org redirects link to these files.

Note, that the generated files are git-ignored.
